articles.title: HOW AI IS CHANGING SEARCH, FROM BACK-END TO FRONT
articles.summary: The early days of search were heavily keyword-based. Later, ML and NLP enabled search engines to interpret the semantics behind queries, allowing for more accurate and contextually relevant results.

articles.title: Download the white paper →
ANTHROPIC RESEARCHERS TRACE THE THOUGHTS OF LLMS
OPENAI EXPANDS CYBERSECURITY GRANT PROGRAM
articles.summary: OpenAI has outlined its ongoing efforts to support AI-native cybersecurity research. They now include microgrants and expanded areas like model privacy and agentic security.

articles.title: CLAUDE 3.7 SONNET USAGE TRENDS IN LABOR
articles.summary: Anthropic's latest report revealed how Claude 3.7 Sonnet is used across coding, education, and healthcare tasks. It offers new insights into how AI augments or automates different occupations.

articles.title: DIFFUSION-BASED COUNTERFACTUALS
articles.summary: This paper introduces two methods that use diffusion models to generate counterfactual explanations in image regression tasks, highlighting trade-offs in sparsity and quality between pixel and latent space approaches.

articles.title: MIXTURE-OF-MAMBA
articles.summary: Mixture-of-Mamba introduces modality-aware sparsity to state-space models (SSMs), enabling efficient multi-modal pretraining. It achieves similar performance to Transformers with significantly lower computational cost across text, image, and speech modalities.

articles.title: OPEN PROBLEMS IN MECHANISTIC INTERPRETABILITY
articles.summary: A great paper that talks through some of the challenges and unsolved problems facing the field when trying to understand how knowledge and skills are represented internally in a language model.

articles.title: BRIA AI, THE BELLE OF THE BALL FOR VISUAL GENERATIVE AI @NVIDIA GTC 2025!
articles.summary: Over 20K attendees roamed downtown San Jose for 2025 GTC last week; AI developers learned from Bria.ai [12] How to build predictable, controllable, on-brand visual content at scale while respecting artists' rights.

articles.title: Built on Licensed Data, Not Scraped (a.k.a stolen) Data.

MEASURING INTERNAL BIAS IN VISION MODELS
articles.summary: A new metric that uses attention maps to quantify internal bias in vision models. It is capable of identifying confounding features and going beyond group-based accuracy disparities.

articles.title: GUIDANCE-FREE TRAINING FOR IMAGE MODELS
articles.summary: Guidance-Free Training (GFT) removes the need for Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) in visual generative models, reducing computational cost without sacrificing performance. Unlike distillation-based approaches, GFT trains from scratch and requires minimal modifications to existing codebases.

articles.title: A UNIVERSAL INTERATOMIC POTENTIAL
articles.summary: PET-MAD is a universal interatomic potential model trained on the MAD dataset that is capable of predicting energies and forces for complex materials modeling across the periodic table.

articles.title: FLUX INPAINTING (HUGGING FACE HUB)
articles.summary: Inpainting support for the new powerful diffusion model Flux.

articles.title: HUGGING FACE CUSTOM RERANKER TRAINING
articles.summary: This post walks through how to fine-tune high-performing reranker models using Sentence Transformers 4.0, outperforming many large public rerankers with smaller, specialized versions.

articles.title: AI PREDICTION MODEL IS A MAJOR BREAKTHROUGH IN WEATHER FORECASTING
articles.summary: Aardvark Weather, developed by the University of Cambridge, offers rapid AI-driven weather forecasting on desktop computers while needing less data and computing power than traditional models. It surpasses conventional systems like the U.S. GFS in accuracy across multiple metrics and provides customizable, location-specific predictions. The system's accessibility democratizes forecasting, making it viable even in regions with limited infrastructure.

articles.title: RUNNING RAG LOCALLY WITH DEEPSEEK, ELASTICSEARCH, OLLAMA, AND KIBANA
articles.summary: Follow this step-by-step tutorial to install Ollama locally, run it in a container, connect to Kibana, and run local RAG and inference

articles.title: with DeepSeek R1. Read the blog
AWS GENERATIVE AI EXEC LEAVES TO LAUNCH STARTUP
articles.summary: Raj Aggarwal is leaving AWS, where he served as GM of generative AI, to start a new company.

articles.title: BROWSER USE, THE TOOL MAKING IT EASIER FOR AI 'AGENTS' TO NAVIGATE WEBSITES, RAISES $17M
articles.summary: Browser Use, a Y Combinator startup, enhances AI agent navigation on websites by converting site elements into a text-like format.

articles.title: XR TRAINING WITH LLAMA-POWERED SIMULATIONS
articles.summary: Cornerstone is transforming enterprise training with XR and the Llama 3.1 model, enabling the fast creation of personalized simulations that feature intelligent virtual mentors and real-time multilingual capabilities.
